finding: `framework-mode claim` could reject the same actor's still-live temporary framework lock as `ATM_FRAMEWORK_STALE_LOCK_CLEANUP_REQUIRED` when the lock had no linked task context yet, blocking a normal same-session scope refresh or claim widening.
expectedBehavior: The same actor should be allowed to reuse its active unlabeled temporary framework lock for the same framework session, instead of being forced through false stale-lock cleanup.
evidenceOrRepro: Reproduced on 2026-06-28 while widening the staged framework merge scope on `main`: a valid temp lock for `codex-gpt-5.4-mini` existed, but a follow-up claim was blocked as `possibly-stale` only because ATM could not resolve linked task metadata. Landed in `c589f125049ad81adc146f1b78e6a5ee36b8f607` and verified by `packages/cli/src/commands/framework-development/__tests__/temp-claim.spec.ts` plus successful same-actor follow-up claim flow during the `main` repair lane.
followUp: Keep regression coverage in `packages/cli/src/commands/framework-development/__tests__/temp-claim.spec.ts` for same-actor unlabeled temp-lock reuse.
